section_miscategorizations.text: I recommend an MRI of the right shoulder to rule out other pathology and refer the patient to physical therapy for six to eight weeks.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence describes specific management actions (ordering imaging and making a referral), which belong in the Plan rather than the Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: I will consider a steroid injection if symptoms persist despite physical therapy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit future management plan/contingency rather than diagnostic impression, so it belongs in the Plan section.
